Query.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME", C.CASE_TYPE AS "C.CASE_TYPE", C.INSOLVENCY_NUMBER AS "C.INSOLVENCY_NUMBER", C.TRANSFER_STATUS AS "C.TRANSFER_STATUS", C.CRED_CODE AS "C.CRED_CODE", C.STATUS AS "C.STATUS", C.TRACK AS "C.TRACK", C.PREF_COURT_CODE AS "C.PREF_COURT_CODE", CT2.NAME AS "CT2.NAME", C.JUDGE AS "C.JUDGE", C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED AS "C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED", C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED_CURRENCY AS "C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED_CURRENCY", (SELECT CRC.RV_IIT_CODE_1 FROM CCBC_REF_CODES CRC WHERE CRC.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND CRC.RV_DOMAIN IN ('CURRENT_CASE_TYPE','CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT')) AS "C.JURISDICTION", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM CASES C1 WHERE C1.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND NOT C1.CASE_TYPE IN (SELECT REF.RV_LOW_VALUE FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE' OR REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT')) AS "C.OBSOLETE_CASE_TYPE", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND OB.AE_EVENT_SEQ IS NULL AND DELETE_FLAG = 'N') AS "OB.ACTIVE_OBLIGATIONS", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND OB.AE_EVENT_SEQ IS NULL AND DELETE_FLAG = 'Y') AS "OB.DELETED_OBLIGATIONS" , (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM WINDOW_FOR_TRIAL WFT WHERE WFT.WFT_CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER) AS "WFT.EXIST", (SELECT DECODE( COUNT(*), 0 , 'false', 'true') FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND ((W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.DEFENDANT_ID = 1 AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' ) ) OR ( W.DEFENDANT2 IS NOT NULL AND W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.DEFENDANT_ID = 2 AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' )))) AS "W.IS_OUTSTANDING", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.ENFORCEMENT_PARENT = C.CASE_NUMBER) AS "PY.PAYMENTS_EXIST", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CAPR WHERE CAPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND NVL(CAPR.CONFIDENTIAL,'N') = 'Y') AS "C.CONFIDENTIAL", C.ORA_ROWSCN AS "C_ORA_ROWSCN", CT.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT_ORA_ROWSCN", CT2.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT2_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASES C, COURTS CT, COURTS CT2 WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND C.CASE_TYPE != 'MAGS ORDER' AND C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE = CT.CODE AND CT2.CODE (+)= C.PREF_COURT_CODE

Query.Join: ( CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID ) OR ( CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'CLAIMANT' AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = 1 AND NVL(CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG,'N') = 'N' ) )

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT CE_BMS_TASK_NUMBER AS "CE.BMS_TASK_NUMBER" , CE_CASE_FLAG AS "CE.CASE_FLAG" , CE_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CE.CASE_PARTY_NO" , CE_CREATING_COURT AS "CE.CREATING_COURT" , CE_CREATING_SECTION AS "CE.CREATING_SECTION" , CE_CRT_CODE AS "CE.CRT_CODE" , CE_DELETED_FLAG AS "CE.DELETED_FLAG" , CE_DETAILS AS "CE.DETAILS" , CE_EVENT_DATE AS "CE.EVENT_DATE" , CE_EVENT_SEQ AS "CE.EVENT_SEQ" , CE_HRG_SEQ AS "CE.HRG_SEQ" , CE_JUDG_SEQ AS "CE.JUDG_SEQ" , CE_MCOL_REFERENCE AS "CE.MCOL_REFERENCE" , CE_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CE.PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , CE_RECEIPT_DATE AS "CE.RECEIPT_DATE" , CE_REQUESTER AS "CE.REQUESTER" , CE_RESULT AS "CE.RESULT" , CE_STATS_MODULE AS "CE.STATS_MODULE" , CE_STD_EVENT_ID AS "CE.STD_EVENT_ID" , CE_USERNAME AS "CE.USERNAME" , CE_USERALIAS AS "CE.USERALIAS" , CE_TRANSREASON AS "CE.TRANSFER_REASON" , CE_TRACK AS "CE.TRACK" , SE_DESCRIPTION AS "SE.DESCRIPTION" , SE_EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE.EDIT_DETAILS" , CE_PARTY_KEY AS "CE.PARTY_KEY" , CE_ORA_ROWSCN AS "CE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE_ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CE.DELETED_FLAG , CE.EVENT_SEQ DESC) AS R , CE.BMS_TASK_NUMBER AS "CE_BMS_TASK_NUMBER" , CE.CASE_FLAG AS "CE_CASE_FLAG" , CE.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CE_CASE_PARTY_NO" , CE.CREATING_COURT AS "CE_CREATING_COURT" , CE.CREATING_SECTION AS "CE_CREATING_SECTION" , CE.CRT_CODE AS "CE_CRT_CODE" , CE.DELETED_FLAG AS "CE_DELETED_FLAG" , CE.DETAILS AS "CE_DETAILS" , CE.EVENT_DATE AS "CE_EVENT_DATE" , CE.EVENT_SEQ AS "CE_EVENT_SEQ" , CE.HRG_SEQ AS "CE_HRG_SEQ" , CE.JUDG_SEQ AS "CE_JUDG_SEQ" , NVL(CE.MCOL_REFERENCE,'CE'||TO_CHAR(CE.EVENT_SEQ)) AS "CE_MCOL_REFERENCE" , CE.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CE_PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , CE.RECEIPT_DATE AS "CE_RECEIPT_DATE" , CE.REQUESTER AS "CE_REQUESTER" , CE.RESULT AS "CE_RESULT" , CE.STATS_MODULE AS "CE_STATS_MODULE" , CE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "CE_STD_EVENT_ID" , CE.USERNAME AS "CE_USERNAME" , ( SELECT NVL(DU.USER_SHORT_NAME, '') FROM DCA_USER DU WHERE DU.USER_ID = CE.USERNAME ) AS "CE_USERALIAS" , CE.TRANSFER_REASON AS "CE_TRANSREASON" , CE.TRACK AS "CE_TRACK" , SE.DESCRIPTION AS "SE_DESCRIPTION" , SE.EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE_EDIT_DETAILS" , DECODE(CE.CASE_PARTY_NO, null, null, CE.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CE.CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "CE_PARTY_KEY" , CE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_EVENTS CE , STANDARD_EVENTS SE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = SE.EVENT_ID ORDER BY CE.DELETED_FLAG, CE.EVENT_SEQ DESC) WHERE R < ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})+1) AND R > ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})-${param.pageSize})

( SELECT CE.EVENT_SEQ AS "CE.EVENT_SEQ" , 'WP' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , WO.FINAL_IND AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , TO_CHAR(WO.OUTPUT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , 'Word Processing Output' AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(WO.XMLSOURCE) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" , '' AS "OUTPUT.REPORT_ID" FROM WP_OUTPUT WO, CASE_EVENTS CE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND WO.EVENT_SEQ = CE.EVENT_SEQ AND WO.OUTPUT_ID = (SELECT MAX(WO2.OUTPUT_ID) FROM WP_OUTPUT WO2 WHERE WO2.EVENT_SEQ = CE.EVENT_SEQ AND WO2.FINAL_IND = WO.FINAL_IND) ) UNION ALL ( SELECT CE.EVENT_SEQ AS "CE.EVENT_SEQ" , 'OR' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , 'Y' AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , RO.ORDER_ID AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , OT.ORDER_DESCRIPTION AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(RQ.DOCUMENT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" , TO_CHAR(RO.REPORT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.REPORT_ID" FROM REPORT_OUTPUT RO , REPORT_QUEUE RQ , CASE_EVENTS CE , ORDER_TYPES OT WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND RO.EVENT_SEQ = CE.EVENT_SEQ AND RQ.ID = RO.REPORT_ID AND OT.ORDER_ID = RO.ORDER_ID )
